what_it_does: Blender plugin for Tripo AI text/image/multiview 3D generation with progress tracking and import flow.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance for artist-friendly avatar generation and review directly inside Blender.
possible_use: Use as the Blender-side bridge for generating, importing, and inspecting Morgan 3D assets.
important_notes: Requires Blender, internet access, and a Tripo API key; pair with rigging outputs from UniRig/SkinTokens/AniGen.
